queries.question: What instruments are associated with each lab technician?
queries.sql: SELECT Instruments.instrumentName  from Lab_Technicians_Instruments join Instruments on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.instrumentId = Instruments.id join Lab_Technicians on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.technicianId = Lab_Technicians.id   GROUP BY Lab_Technicians_Instruments.instrumentId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Lab_Technicians_Instruments.technicianId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Lab_Technicians)

queries.question: What instruments are associated with each lab technician?
queries.sql: select lab_technicians.name , instruments.instrumentname from Lab_Technicians_Instruments join Instruments on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.instrumentId = Instruments.id join Lab_Technicians on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.technicianId = Lab_Technicians.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?instrumentname WHERE {
  ?lab_technicians_instruments a :Lab_Technicians_Instruments .
  ?instruments a :Instruments .
  ?lab_technicians_instruments p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
  ?lab_technicians a :Lab_Technicians .
  ?lab_technicians_instruments p:hasLab_Technicians ?lab_technicians .
  ?lab_technicians p:name ?name .
  ?instruments p:instrumentName ?instrumentname .
}

queries.question: What description of instruments is common for all lab technicians?
queries.sql: SELECT Instruments.description  from Lab_Technicians_Instruments join Instruments on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.instrumentId = Instruments.id join Lab_Technicians on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.technicianId = Lab_Technicians.id   GROUP BY Lab_Technicians_Instruments.instrumentId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Lab_Technicians_Instruments.technicianId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Lab_Technicians)

queries.question: For each lab technician, list information about the instruments they use (their names and descriptions).
queries.sql: select lab_technicians.name , instruments.instrumentname , instruments.description from Lab_Technicians_Instruments join Instruments on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.instrumentId = Instruments.id join Lab_Technicians on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.technicianId = Lab_Technicians.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?instrumentname ?description WHERE {
  ?lab_technicians_instruments a :Lab_Technicians_Instruments .
  ?instruments a :Instruments .
  ?lab_technicians_instruments p:hasInstruments ?instruments .
  ?lab_technicians a :Lab_Technicians .
  ?lab_technicians_instruments p:hasLab_Technicians ?lab_technicians .
  ?lab_technicians p:name ?name .
  ?instruments p:instrumentName ?instrumentname .
  ?instruments p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Tell me about the instruments every lab technician uses (their names and descriptions).
queries.sql: SELECT Instruments.instrumentName, Instruments.description  from Lab_Technicians_Instruments join Instruments on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.instrumentId = Instruments.id join Lab_Technicians on Lab_Technicians_Instruments.technicianId = Lab_Technicians.id   GROUP BY Lab_Technicians_Instruments.instrumentId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Lab_Technicians_Instruments.technicianId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Lab_Technicians)

SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {

  ?lab_technicians_instruments p:hasInstruments ?instruments .

}
